notes: RokidBrew 0.2.1 fixes an immediate launch crash on EMUI 14 / Android 14 devices, reported on Huawei Mate XT.
changes: Fixed startup crash on EMUI 14 / Android 14 devices.
Guarded Android 15-only frame-rate API calls on older Android versions.
Keeps high-refresh-rate behavior enabled on compatible Android 15+ devices.
